emails.subject: Re: expiry time on 597006.01, 596993.01
emails.body: Re: expiry time on 597006.01, 596993.01 That's strange I entered these deals for Matt yesterday, and specifically typed 2 p.m. into the expiry date. Somehow it changed over, but I've changed it back and re-saved it so it should read 2 PM. Thanks for catching that, Kate Stephanie Piwetz 05/01/2001 07:48 AM
